description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the Docker image registry.gitlab.gnome.org/gnome/gnome-runtime-images/gnome:3.30. Define a single job named flatpak_bundle (default stage) that caches the directory .flatpak-builder/cache, runs the commands flatpak-builder --repo=repo app com.github.bleakgrey.tootle.json and flatpak build-bundle repo tootle.flatpak --runtime-repo=https://dl.flathub.org/repo/flathub.flatpakrepo com.github.bleakgrey.tootle master, and publishes the generated tootle.flatpak file as an artifact.
